files_inspected: truck coordinate and service-area discoverability logic
Food Trucks count and card rendering
root_cause: /scout depended on /api/restaurants/subscribed/... for broader truck inventory. That endpoint's business-access filtering collapsed production output to only 3D Eats, and trucks without exact profile coordinates were dropped before the frontend could render them as service-area/not-live trucks.
behavior_before: Production /scout showed only 3D Eats or collapsed broader discoverable truck inventory; trucks without exact coordinates could not render as service-area/not-live trucks.
behavior_after: Production /scout shows six nearby food truck cards with honest not-live/live labeling. Public food-truck profiles and Pensacola service-area trucks without exact coordinates are included, truck rows are kept out of the restaurant lane, and route CTAs are removed unless live.

production_verification.browser_evidence: Food Trucks 6 nearby; visible cards include 3D Eats & Tea, Blessed Berry Bowls, Sweet Love, All Gas No Brakes Reloaded, CREATIVBOWLS, and Jays Southern Cuisine

final_git_status: MealScout main at 2b2f0a88; production verified by Thomas
